canonical_definition: A large-scale dataset of Culture Specific Items (CSIs) for India, containing approximately 8,000 concepts from 17 cultural facets across 36 sub-regions, used for evaluating cultural text adaptation.
papers: Word Salad Chopper: Reasoning Models Waste A Ton Of Decoding Budget On Useless Repetitions, Self-Knowingly
